summary: Iteration 48 - Orientation Map Layer testing complete. All new features verified: OrientationMap component visible on all 6 tabs (Home, Feed, Community, Insights, Theory, History) with 6 stages (reality→human→opposition→choice→action→field). Active stage has larger w-8 h-8 node with pulse animation. Past stages show indigo dots, future stages show gray dots. Stage auto-advances from 'reality' to 'human' after 2 seconds on page load. Opposition Layer shows personal position data with 3 mini axis bars in dark card (סדר↔כאוס, קולקטיב↔אגו, יציבות↔חקירה). EntryLayer shows dynamic world direction with CTA button. QuickDecisionButton (FAB) dispatches 'field' stage after sending action. All regression tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: OrientationMap component properly listens for 'orientation-stage' custom events and updates stage index
Stage styling correctly uses w-8 h-8 for active, w-5 h-5 for past/future stages
Auto-advance from 'reality' to 'human' after 2s timer works correctly
OppositionLayer fetches /api/profile/{userId}/record to get opposition_axes and displays in AxisMini components
EntryLayer correctly dispatches 'reality' and 'human' stages based on API responses
SendToGlobeButton and QuickDecisionButton both dispatch 'field' stage
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all new features work, all regressions pass)

seed_data_creation: Used existing persistent user IDs generated by app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 adds OrientationMap persistent compass component showing 6-stage orientation loop. Key data-testids: 'orientation-map', 'stage-{reality|human|opposition|choice|action|field}'. Active stage has w-8 h-8 class and animate-pulse on inner dot. Stage events dispatched via 'orientation-stage' CustomEvent. OppositionLayer enhanced with 'opposition-personal-position' showing 3 AxisMini bars. Auto-advance fires 2s after page load. EntryLayer has 'entry-world-direction' and 'entry-cta' testids.

orientation_map_tests.6_stages_present: PASS - reality, human, opposition, choice, action, field all have data-testid
orientation_map_tests.active_stage_styling: PASS - w-8 h-8 class on active stage
orientation_map_tests.pulse_animation: PASS - animate-pulse present on active stage
orientation_map_tests.stage_auto_advance: PASS - advances from reality to human after 2s

entry_layer_tests.cta_scroll_to_question: PASS - clicking CTA scrolls to daily question

quick_action_tests.direction_buttons: PASS - contribution, recovery, order, exploration all present
quick_action_tests.field_stage_dispatch: PASS - clicking direction dispatches field stage

regression_tests.community_tab_circles: PASS - circle cards visible with member counts
